achievements.title: This Isn't a Regular Garage
achievements.description: In Stage 1, make your way to Buzz's hideout on Normal difficulty or higher
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: Truck Stop
achievements.description: In Stage 1, defeat Buzz Bravado on his truck and find the whereabouts of Kate on Normal difficulty or higher
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: Goin' Up
achievements.description: In Stage 2, enter the elevator at the construction site on Normal difficulty or higher
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: The One and Only
achievements.description: In Stage 2, defeat Joe Ohsugi to proceed further into the construction site on Normal difficulty or higher
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: Your Girlfriend Is in Another Hideout
achievements.description: In Stage 2, defeat the Missing Link and head Downtown to rescue Kate on Normal difficulty or higher
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: Hey, Where's the Arcade At?
achievements.description: In Stage 3, reach the store at the end of the street on Normal difficulty or higher
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: Better than Casinopolis
achievements.description: In Stage 3, enter the Casino from the alleyways on Normal difficulty or higher
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: Even Chip'n Dale Could Beat You
achievements.description: In Stage 3, defeat the Rude Bros and find where they took Kate on Normal difficulty or above
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: Anchors Aweigh...Right? No?
achievements.description: In Stage 4, reach the boat and leave the dock on Normal difficulty or above
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: Don't Be Late to Save Kate
achievements.description: In Stage 4, defeat Kruel Kurt and head to Faust's hideout in the slums on Normal difficulty or higher
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: Finding a Girl Like "Where's Waldo"
achievements.description: In Stage 5, ride the elevator and enter Faust's hideout through the window on Normal difficulty or higher
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: Out of Castles and Out of Options
achievements.description: In Stage 5, defeat Faust on Normal difficulty or higher
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: Vendetta Is a Dish Best Served Cold
achievements.description: Defeat the Dead End gang leaders once and for all and finally leave the town alive on Normal difficulty or higher
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: Bronze and Bad
achievements.description: Reach a score of 20 (1P)
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: Quicksilver Fighter
achievements.description: Reach a score of 40 (1P)
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: Golden Champ
achievements.description: Reach a score of 70 (1P)
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: "I Pity the Fool!"
achievements.description: Reach first place in the score ranking and enter your initials as MRT
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: No Ears Were Bitten Off During This Game
achievements.description: Beat the game as Blood without ever changing characters or getting a Game Over on Normal difficulty or higher
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: Hollywood Hawk
achievements.description: Beat the game as Hawk without ever changing characters or getting a Game Over on Normal difficulty or higher
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: Even Van Damme Would Be Proud
achievements.description: Beat the game as Boomer without ever changing characters or getting a Game over on Normal difficulty or higher
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: Inspired by Rocky III
achievements.description: Beat the game with Sledge without ever changing characters or getting a Game Over on Normal difficulty or higher
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: The Legend of Vendetta
achievements.description: Start your second quest and save Kate again
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: We are The Cobras
achievements.description: Beat the game a second time on Normal difficulty or above
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: Soon to Be Featured in the "Chef's Table"
achievements.description: Defeat ten enemies with a knife (1P)
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: Learned from the Bambino Himself
achievements.description: Defeat ten enemies with a spiked club (1P)
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: Now Watch Me Whip!
achievements.description: Defeat five enemies with a whip (1P)
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: My Training Paid Off
achievements.description: Clear any Stage damageless on Normal difficulty or Higher
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: If It's in the Game, It's Free to Use
achievements.description: Pick up every weapon and throwable item in a single session (1P)
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: Lone Wolf
achievements.description: Clear Stage 1 without losing a life on Normal difficulty or higher (1P)
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: Toretto Lent It to Me!
achievements.description: In Stage 2, grab a shotgun and kill six enemies on Normal difficulty or higher (1P)
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: Is This the Famous CHAVES in Brazil?
achievements.description: In Stage 2, grab a bucket and throw at the enemy
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: Did You See Something?
achievements.description: In Stage 2, reach the bottom floor without getting hit on Normal difficulty or higher
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: I'll Show My Chain to You!
achievements.description: In Stage 2, hit the Missing Link eight times with a chain on Normal difficulty or higher without dying (1P)
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: Someone Wants to Play...
achievements.description: In Stage 3, don't let the "policemen" grab you in the first section (1P)
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: Hey Hey, I'll Play With You Some Other Time!
achievements.description: In Stage 3, let the "policemen" grab you and watch in horror (1P)
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: Celadon Game Corner
achievements.description: In Stage 3, find every hidden item in the Casino section (1P)
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: Only with Your Hands
achievements.description: Complete Stage 4 without grabbing any items or food on Normal difficulty or higher
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: Doggystyle
achievements.description: In Stage 5, let the guard dog "attack" you in the first section
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: Can't This Thing Go Any Faster?!
achievements.description: In Stage 5, finish the elevator section in 15 seconds or less on Normal difficulty or higher (1P only)
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: Mio Nome é Vendetta
achievements.description: In Stage 5, reach Faust's floor within five minutes on Normal difficulty or higher (1P)
achievements.author: Chr0x

achievements.title: Vendetta Means "Revenge" in Italian
achievements.description: Beat the game losing no more than five lives in total across all players on Very Difficult difficulty
achievements.author: Chr0x
